app.name: BountyFetch
app.tagline: The Fastest Intelligent Radar for Coding Opportunities

landing.hero_desc: BountyFetch monitors, filters, and ranks freelance tasks and coding projects from dozens of sources simultaneously — delivering them to you with a ready proposal before your competitors even notice.
landing.hero_trust: No credit card required · Instant access · Works across all platforms
landing.features_title: Everything You Need to Win Tasks — In One Place
landing.features_sub: BountyFetch is engineered to be your complete arsenal: from automated discovery to polished delivery.
landing.feature_radar_desc: A continuous monitoring engine that scans thousands of tech communities in real time, filtering opportunities with 97%+ precision via specialized AI models.
landing.feature_proposal_desc: BountyFetch drafts tailored professional proposals for each opportunity, leveraging your skill context and project history — in Arabic or English within seconds.
landing.feature_shield_desc: A built-in specialist that analyzes your submitted code, detects bugs, and proposes precise CSS/JS fixes before delivery — ensuring zero-defect quality.
landing.how_title: Three Steps That Change Your Trajectory
landing.step1_desc: Define your skills, experience level, and goals. BountyFetch uses this data to calibrate the radar with high precision.
landing.step2_desc: The radar operates around the clock, monitoring communities and freelance platforms, alerting you instantly when a matching opportunity appears.
landing.step3_desc: One click gets you a ready-to-send proposal, execution assistance, and delivery at unmatched quality.
landing.cta_title: The Next Opportunity Won't Wait — BountyFetch Waits For You
landing.cta_desc: Join the developers who use artificial intelligence as a genuine competitive edge.

proposal.title: AI Proposal Engine
proposal.placeholder: Press a button above to generate your professional proposal
